name: semantic-memory
description: Local-first persistent semantic memory for Claude Code: low-latency per-prompt auto-recall (warm HTTP server — no cold-spawn, with SM_RECALL_EXCLUDE_NS namespace blocklist), project-scoped session priming, pre-compaction capture, codebase ingestion, a memory-keeper subagent, and skills to capture/curate/explore/sync — over the semantic-memory-mcp server (61 sm_* tools, full profile: 33 lean / 48 standard / 61 full; hybrid + RL-routed search with persisted policy, bitemporal as-of search, conversation session/message persistence with hybrid search, graph/topology/community/factor-graph, content-based contradiction detection, claim verification, supersede/consolidate, autonomous lifecycle, real integrity checks, knowledge-runtime orchestration, llm-output-parser integration, and import-envelope support).
